view_3d_map.label: 3D map
view_3d_map.description: A full globe view in WGS84 coordinate system with terrain and imagery layers.

view_25d_map.label: 2.5D map
view_25d_map.description: A planar view with perspective, ideal for urban navigation and building extrusion.

view_2d_map.label: 2D map
view_2d_map.description: A strictly top-down orthographic view for standard map navigation.

view_3d_map_webxr.label: 3D map WebXR
view_3d_map_webxr.description: Virtual Reality experience for iTowns globe using the WebXR API.

view_multiglobe.label: Multiple globes
view_multiglobe.description: Rendering several synchronized 3D globes in the same viewer.

view_multi_25d.label: Multiple 2.5D maps
view_multi_25d.description: Comparison of several planar views with different data or timeframes.

view_immersive.label: Immersive view
view_immersive.description: Street-level exploration with panoramic imagery and ground-level navigation.

view_3d_mns_map.label: Digital surface model
view_3d_mns_map.description: 3D view incorporating buildings and vegetation heights (DSM) on top of the terrain.

geoid_geoidLayer.label: Display geoid heights
geoid_geoidLayer.description: Essential for aligning GPS data with sea-level altitudes to prevent objects from floating or being buried.

3dtiles_loader.label: 3D Tiles loader
3dtiles_loader.description: Native support for the OGC 3D Tiles standard for massive 3D dataset streaming.

pointcloud_loader.label: Pointcloud loader
pointcloud_loader.description: General purpose loader for streaming and rendering massive point clouds.

pointcloud_loader_globe.label: Pointcloud loader (globe)
pointcloud_loader_globe.description: Specific integration of large-scale point clouds onto a 3D globe.

potree_25d_map.label: Potree 2.5D map
potree_25d_map.description: Visualizes Potree-formatted point clouds in a planar view.

potree2_25d_map.label: Potree 2.5D map 2.0 format
potree2_25d_map.description: Support for the newer, more efficient Potree 2.0 data structure.

potree_3d_map.label: Potree 3D map
potree_3d_map.description: Full 3D integration of Potree datasets with elevation management.

laz_dragndrop.label: LAS/LAZ viewer
laz_dragndrop.description: Client-side drag and drop functionality for local Lidar files.

entwine_simple_loader.label: Entwine loader
entwine_simple_loader.description: Support for Entwine Point Tile (EPT) datasets for browser-based Lidar streaming.

entwine_3d_loader.label: Entwine 3D loader
entwine_3d_loader.description: Advanced EPT integration with 3D terrain and coordinate transformation.

copc_simple_loader.label: COPC loader
copc_simple_loader.description: Streams Cloud Optimized Point Clouds (COPC) directly from the cloud.

copc_3d_loader.label: COPC 3D loader
copc_3d_loader.description: Optimized COPC visualization with terrain-aware rendering.

vpc_simple_loader.label: VPC loader
vpc_simple_loader.description: Integration of Virtual Point Clouds for large-scale data management.

vpc_3d_loader.label: VPC 3D loader
vpc_3d_loader.description: Enhanced 3D visualization of VPC assets synchronized with maps.

vector_tile_raster_3d.label: Raster on 3D map
vector_tile_raster_3d.description: Draws vector data (roads, borders, labels) as a transparent imagery layer on top of the 3D globe.

vector_tile_raster_2d.label: Raster on 2D map
vector_tile_raster_2d.description: Classic 2D map rendering using vector tile sources.

vector_tile_mapbox_raster.label: Mapbox Vector Tiles to raster
vector_tile_mapbox_raster.description: Specific implementation for converting Mapbox vector format to viewable raster layers.

vector_tile_3d_mesh.label: Vector tile to 3d objects
vector_tile_3d_mesh.description: Directly transforms vector tile data into 3D meshes (e.g. 3D buildings).

vector_tile_3d_mesh_mapbox.label: Mapbox Vector tile to 3d objects
vector_tile_3d_mesh_mapbox.description: Specific extrusion of Mapbox vector data into 3D geometry.

vector_tile_dragndrop.label: Drag and drop a style
vector_tile_dragndrop.description: Instantly change the map look by dropping a Mapbox Style JSON file.

source_stream_wfs_25d.label: WFS to 2.5D objects
source_stream_wfs_25d.description: Streams WFS features and renders them as extruded objects in planar view.

source_stream_wfs_3d.label: WFS to 3D objects
source_stream_wfs_3d.description: Dynamic fetching and mesh creation from WFS servers for globe visualization.

source_stream_wfs_raster.label: WFS to raster
source_stream_wfs_raster.description: Converts WFS vector features into a raster layer for high-performance display.

source_file_from_format.label: format
source_file_from_format.description: Defining custom file format parsing logic for data sources.

source_file_from_methods.label: fetcher and parser
source_file_from_methods.description: Customizes how data is retrieved from servers and processed.

source_file_geojson_raster.label: GeoJSON to raster
source_file_geojson_raster.description: Renders local or remote GeoJSON files as a flat image layer.

source_file_geojson_raster_2.label: USGS GeoJSON flux to raster (planar view)
source_file_geojson_raster_2.description: Handling real-time USGS earthquake data streams as map layers.

source_file_geojson_3d.label: GeoJSON to 3D objects
source_file_geojson_3d.description: Creates actual 3D geometry from GeoJSON features with height attributes.

source_file_kml_raster.label: KML to raster
source_file_kml_raster.description: Displays KML/KMZ files as imagery layers on the terrain.

source_file_kml_raster_usgs.label: USGS KML flux to raster
source_file_kml_raster_usgs.description: Integration of live USGS KML feeds for natural disaster monitoring.

source_file_gpx_raster.label: GPX to raster
source_file_gpx_raster.description: Visualizes GPS track files as flat lines on the map.

source_file_gpx_3d.label: GPX to 3D objects
source_file_gpx_3d.description: Displays GPX paths in 3D space, following the terrain elevation.

source_file_cog.label: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG)
source_file_cog.description: Directly streams portions of heavy TIFF files for fast imagery display.

source_file_from_fetched_data.label: Handle fetching step
source_file_from_fetched_data.description: Overriding the network request phase for custom authentication or headers.

source_file_from_parsed_data.label: Handle parsing step
source_file_from_parsed_data.description: Providing custom logic to convert raw data into iTowns-compatible objects.

source_file_shapefile.label: Shapefile case
source_file_shapefile.description: Specialized loader for handling legacy Shapefile data in the browser.

effects_postprocessing.label: Post processing
effects_postprocessing.description: Applies visual filters like Bloom, AO, or color correction to the scene.

effects_split.label: Splitted rendering
effects_split.description: Renders two different states of the map with a slider for comparison.

effects_stereo.label: Stereo effects
effects_stereo.description: Enables anaglyph or side-by-side rendering for 3D depth perception.

mars.label: Mars atmosphere
mars.description: Specific shader effects to simulate the Martian atmospheric scattering.

customColorLayerEffect.label: Custom Color Effect
customColorLayerEffect.description: Demonstrates how to inject custom shaders into imagery layers.

misc_colorlayer_visibility.label: Check ColorLayer visibility
misc_colorlayer_visibility.description: Tools to manage and toggle different imagery layers on the fly.

misc_collada.label: Collada
misc_collada.description: Loading external 3D models (DAE) and placing them on the map.

misc_clamp_ground.label: Clamp 3d object to ground
misc_clamp_ground.description: Ensures 3D objects automatically snap to the elevation of the terrain.

misc_camera_animation.label: Camera animation
misc_camera_animation.description: Programmatic movement of the camera between predefined locations.

misc_compare_25d_3d.label: Compare 2.5D and 3D maps
misc_compare_25d_3d.description: Simultaneous visualization of planar and globe views.

misc_georeferenced_images.label: Georeferenced image
misc_georeferenced_images.description: Placing a single non-tiled image at a specific geographic location.

misc_orthographic_camera.label: Orthographic camera
misc_orthographic_camera.description: Using a non-perspective camera for technical or engineering views.

misc_custom_label.label: Custom label popup
misc_custom_label.description: Adding HTML-based popups or labels linked to geographic coordinates.

misc_camera_traveling.label: Camera traveling
misc_camera_traveling.description: Smooth interpolation of the camera along a complex 3D path.

misc_instancing.label: 3D objects instancing
misc_instancing.description: Efficient rendering of thousands of identical 3D objects (like trees or streetlights).

misc_geotiff.label: Geotiff elevation from stream
misc_geotiff.description: Using GeoTIFF data to define the vertical relief of the terrain.

widgets_navigation.label: Navigation
widgets_navigation.description: Built-in UI components for zooming and rotating the view.

widgets_minimap.label: Minimap
widgets_minimap.description: Small secondary map widget showing current location in global context.

widgets_scale.label: Scale
widgets_scale.description: Dynamic scale bar adjusted according to zoom level and latitude.

widgets_searchbar.label: Searchbar
widgets_searchbar.description: Integrated geocoding tool to fly to specific addresses or cities.

widgets_3dtiles_style.label: 3DTiles Style
widgets_3dtiles_style.description: UI for dynamically applying 3D Tiles Styling language to meshes.

plugins_drag_n_drop.label: Drag and drop
plugins_drag_n_drop.description: Framework-wide support for adding files to the view by dragging them.

plugins_pyramidal_tiff.label: Pyramidal TIFFs
plugins_pyramidal_tiff.description: Advanced support for multi-resolution TIFF imagery.

plugins_vrt.label: VRT Parser
plugins_vrt.description: Support for GDAL Virtual Format (VRT) for complex dataset indexing.
